title: Accent Chairs
subtitle: Handcrafted seating
description: Sculptural armchairs and accent seating — hand-finished upholstery and frames made by women-led workshops.

title: Dining Chairs
subtitle: Chairs & stools
description: Dining chairs and handcrafted stools in timber, rattan, and woven materials — designed for gathering and daily use.

title: Dining Tables
subtitle: Marble & solid surfaces
description: Dining tables with stone, marble, and timber tops — anchoring pieces for residential and boutique hospitality spaces.

title: Storage
subtitle: Buffets, cabinets & wardrobes
description: Sideboards, buffets, wardrobes, and case goods in rattan, timber, and mixed materials — ethical production with enduring form.

title: Display Cabinet
subtitle: Curated display
description: Display cabinets for objects, ceramics, and collected pieces — gallery-like presence for living and retail interiors.

title: Side Tables
subtitle: Occasional tables
